    More info
    eBird
     3 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) (David Kelly) "All drakes, known birds. Smaller than Velvet with white patches on forehead and nape."
  • Surf Scoter

     3 Musselburgh Lagoons (Martin Stervander) "Three drakes. Two sticking together; the other one not far off. In flock with 61 velvet scoters."

    More info
    eBird
     1 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) (Sasha Bertasius) "Excellent views of continuing male bird in old scrapes, seen through the middle hide. No rings seen on legs nor clipped wings, indicating that it's a wild bird. Was then gone after approximately 15:20."
